properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Stores the metadata of the study.

fields.study_id: Identifier sent to the server with response data.
fields.created_by: Creator or author of the study.
fields.post_url: URL where participant responses are sent.
fields.empty_msg: Message shown when no tasks are available.
fields.banner_url: Image displayed in the study app.
fields.cache: Whether media should be cached for offline use.
fields.pls: URL to the Plain Language Statement PDF.

fields.id: Unique lowercase identifier for the module.
fields.name: Displayed module name. Basic HTML is supported.
fields.condition: Participant condition for which the module is scheduled.
fields.alerts: Notification title, message, schedule, and behavior.
fields.unlock_after: List of module IDs that must be completed before this module appears.
fields.params: Either survey parameters or PVT parameters.
